issues.description: FlipLife is incorrect. The effect says 'add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand', which is TakeLifeToHand (legacy alias for FlipLife), but FlipLife means flipping a Life card face-up/down. The correct action should be to retrieve a Life card into hand. However, the DSL uses 'FlipLife' which is a legacy alias—this is acceptable per legacy rules, but the intent here is actually AddToHand from Life cards, not flip. This should be clarified or use proper Life-to-hand mechanic if available.

The condition 'You may' makes the entire sequence optional. The DSL structure does not reflect the optionality—it should include a condition or optional flag. Additionally, the 'If you do' clause on DrawCard means the draw only happens if a Character was actually played, but the DSL treats it as unconditional.

DrawCard action is unconditional in DSL but card text says 'If you do, draw 1 card'—the draw should only trigger if PlayFromHand actually resolved (i.e., a Character was played). Needs conditional logic or chaining.
